description: Legal record (#27) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 10v of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 12 Nisan [5322] AM (1562 CE), based on the year mentioned in the preceding entry on f. 10v. Avraham b. Yehuda al-Ḥakīm appears before a communal judge (Shemuʾel ha-dayyan) in the home of Shelomo Fayruz regarding his services in weighing beef. The kosher meat provisions and weighing standards are arranged as part of the communal qodesh. The preceding entry in the court register deals with communal pricing standards on the sale of lamb and raw/grilled meat (PGPID 41052). MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
